a-.definition: neg. prefix (a- before consonants; an- before vowels)

aina[ira].definition: name of a Babylonian, father of Nidintu-Bel

autiyara.definition: name of a district in Armenia

auramazdāh.definition: name of the supreme god, Ahura Mazda

aθriyadiya.definition: name of a Persian month, Nov.-Dec.

adukaniša.definition: name of a Persian month, Oct.-Nov.

anāmaka.definition: name of a Persian month, Dec.-Jan.

aniya.definition: other, another; the one - the other; strange, hostile, an enemy; with ciy, Nom. sg. n. aniyašciy

ar.definition: to set in motion, go, come, arrive; come to, arrive; come down, descend

ariyāramna.definition: Ariaramnes, name of the great-grandfather of Darius

artavardiya.definition: name of one of the generals of Darius

ardumaniš.definition: name of one of the allies of Darius against Gaumāta

aršāma.definition: Arsames, name of the grandfather of Darius

avākanam.definition: I placed (my army) on floats of skins

avadā.definition: there; thither; hacā avadaša therefrom, thence

avahya.definition: to ask aid, implore; seek for help, supplicate

i.definition: to go; come; go beyond, go along; go unto, arrive; beyond measure; go forth; come unto, be one’s possession; go forth, proceed

imaniš.definition: name assumed by Martiya in his insurrection in Susiana

iš.definition: to put in motion, send; send forth

utāna.definition: Otanes, name of one of the allies of Darius against Gaumata

upadaranma.definition: name of the father of Aθrina

u[yam]ā.definition: name of a fortress in Armenia

ušabāri.definition: borne by oxen(?), mounted on camels

uzma.definition: what is up from the earth; stake, pile

kā.definition: particle giving to preceding tuvam thou an indefinite force

kan.definition: to dig, chisel out; obliterate, cause to be forgotten; destroy

kanpada.definition: name of a district in Media

kāpišakāni.definition: name of a fortress in Arachosia

xšaθrita.definition: name assumed by Phraortes, the Median pretender

xši.definition: to rule; hold lordship over; rule

gaumāta.definition: the Median pretender who assumed the name of Smerdis

gandutava.definition: name of a district in Arachosia

gam.definition: to go; come; go forth; come together, assemble

cincixri.definition: name of the father of Martiya

ciy.definition: makes indefinite the interr. pron.; emphasizes slightly the word to which it is joined

caišapai.definition: Teispes, common ancestor of Cyrus and Darius (read cišpi or caišpi)

jan.definition: to smite, slay; smite down, slay; smite down, destroy; wage (battle) against, fight; cut off

jiyamna.definition: waning, growing old, as subs. completion, end

taxmaspāda.definition: name of one of the commanders of Darius

taxš.definition: to be active; work together, cooperate, work

tar.definition: to cross over; depart from, abandon; put across, cross

tigra.definition: name of a fortress in Armenia

tigraxauda.definition: with pointed cap, epithet of Scythians

tya.pos: conjunction; demonstrative pronoun; demonstrative pronoun used as a relative

θuxra.definition: name of the father of Otanes

dātuhya.definition: name of the father of Megabyzus

dādarši.definition: name of; a Persian satrap; an Armenian subject

dar.definition: to hold 2 hold a position halt; obtain

dī.definition: to see; to injure, deprive one (acc.) of something (acc.), take (acc.) from one (acc.)

dubāla.definition: name of a district in Babylonia

draujana.definition: deceiving, false, a follower of the Druj

nadintabaira.definition: Nidintu-Bêl, name of a Babylonian rebel

nabukudracara.definition: Nebuchadrezar, the assumed name of the rebels Nidintu-Bêl and Arkha

nabunaita.definition: Nabonidus, name of the last king of the new Babylonian empire

naama.definition: by name, written naamaa with fem. noun

nī.definition: to lead; lead forth, bring forward

pā.definition: to protect, sustain; guard onself (mid.) against (abl. with hacā)

pat.definition: to fly, fall; rise up, rebel

patiy.definition: with acc. during throughout, at; with instr. at; with loc. in, at; on the other hand, moreover, again, once more

parsa.definition: to ask, examine into, punish; examine, read

pārsa.definition: adj. Persian; As subs. m. Persia

bagābigna.definition: name of the father of Vidarna

bagabuxša.definition: Megabyzos, one of the allies of Darius in the defeat of false Smerdis

bar.definition: to bear, sustain, esteem; bring back, restore; bear away, take away; protect, preserve; proffer, grant

mā.definition: not; to measure; extend (i.e. be of ancient lineage)

magu.definition: name of a Median tribe celebrated in priestcraft, Magian

maθišta.definition: the greatest; as subs. chief, lieader

māh.definition: month, with gen. of the name

yaθā.definition: as; when; because; in order that, that

yam.definition: to reach, attain; appropriate, take to oneself, seize as one’s possession

vāyaspāra.definition: name of the father of Intaphernes

vasiy.definition: much, to a great extent, in large numbers, utterly

vahauka.definition: name of the father of Ardumanish

viθ.definition: royal court, royal race; royal palace

viiθaibaiša.definition: all; with the gods of the royal house

viθabaišacā.definition: and all things; and the royal residences; relating to the royal residences

vindafarnah.definition: Intaphernes, name of ally of Darius against the false Smerdis

vidarna.definition: Hydarnes, name of ally of Darius against the false Smerdis

viyaxna.definition: name of a Persian month, Feb.-March

sikayauvatī.definition: name of a fortress in Media

stā.definition: to stand, halt; place, restore; enjoin, command

sparda.definition: name of a region, according to Lassen, Sardis

hainā.definition: army, hostile host, array of evil

haumavarka.definition: designating a part of the Scythians in Dar. NRa. 3

haxāmanišiya.definition: of the race of Achaemenes, Achaemenidan

hanj.definition: to hale to prison or inflict some form of penalty; with prefix fra

haldita.definition: name of the father of Arkha
